meta.title: Hanns Kuttner on the Move to Digital Payment from the Government
meta.description: Hudson Visiting Fellow Hanns Kuttner describes his fascinating new paper illustrating the federal government's attempt to move to purely digital payments. He discusses the cost savings associated with implementing these systems.
